events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from UCSF Medical Center for client 1086. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: diabetic. Allergies: none. Sodium ceiling 800 mg/meal, carbs 45–65 g/meal. Prefers Mediterranean; dislikes coconut milk. Cooking ability: microwave. 7 meals/week, zone Western Addition.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Baked Cod with Herbed Couscous
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 41 g outside 45–65 g range.

events.title: Rejected: Tabbouleh with Grilled Chicken
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 40 g outside 45–65 g range.

events.title: Matched: Hearty Lentil Soup with Vegetables
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 410/800 mg ✓, carbs 47 g (target 45–65) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Quinoa-Stuffed Bell Peppers
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 417/800 mg ✓, carbs 48 g (target 45–65) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Hummus and Veggie Wrap
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 451/800 mg ✓, carbs 52 g (target 45–65) ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1086 added to route R-WEST-1 (Western Addition), delivery 2026-07-21, window 14:00–16:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1086: 7 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
